job_description:
Responsibilities: 📢 Job Announcement Position: Bicycle Distribution Worker (Bank Job) Qualifications: Minimum SSC pass Must have own bicycle Must have a smartphone Salary: Starting from 12,000 BDT per month (increment based on work and experience) Job Conditions: No security deposit required for the job Must work on regular bank and courier related tasks Workplace: Padma Courier Service 50/1 Purana Paltan Lane, Dhaka In front of Bot-tola Mosque Contact: 📞 0155247709

📢 চাকরির বিজ্ঞপ্তি পদ: সাইকেল বিতরণ কর্মী (ব্যাংকের কাজ) যোগ্যতা: ন্যূনতম এসএসসি পাস নিজস্ব সাইকেল থাকতে হবে স্মার্ট মোবাইল থাকতে হবে বেতন: মাসিক ১২,০০০ টাকা থেকে শুরু (কাজ ও অভিজ্ঞতা অনুযায়ী বৃদ্ধি পাবে) চাকরির শর্তাবলী: চাকরির জন্য কোনো জামানত লাগবে না নিয়মিত ব্যাংক ও কুরিয়ার সংশ্লিষ্ট কাজ করতে হবে কর্মস্থল: পদ্মা কুরিয়ার সার্ভিস ৫০/১ পুরানা পল্টন লাইন, ঢাকা বটতলা মসজিদের সামনে যোগাযোগ: 📞 ০১৫৫২৪৭৭৭০৯

Responsibilities: Handle large volumes of high-pressure inbound customer calls Provide instant and effective on-call solutions Record customer complaints and issues clearly and accurately in the system Maintain a polite, empathetic, and customer-centric attitude during every interaction Maintain confidentiality of customer information and strictly follow company SOPs Work effectively under pressure to meet operational requirements Achieve daily performance targets and maintain call quality standards

Requirements: Running undergraduate or graduate student (any discipline) Excellent communication skills in both Bangla and English (speaking and writing) Strong listening skills with the ability to understand and address customer needs Ability to remain calm, confident, and solution-focused during high-pressure situations Positive attitude with a strong willingness to learn and adapt Good typing speed and basic computer proficiency (MS Office, Google Workspace) Ability to work in rotational shifts and weekends during peak operational hours Previous experience in customer service, call center, courier, or food delivery sector is an added advantage, but freshers are also welcome

Handle large volumes of high pressure inbound customer calls Provide instant and effective on call solutions Record customer complaints and issues clearly and accurately in the system Maintain a polite, empathetic, and customer centric attitude during every interaction Maintain confidentiality of customer information and strictly follow company SOPs Work effectively under pressure to meet operational requirements Achieve daily performance targets and maintain call quality standards

Responsibilities: Responsibilities:
1. Communicate with customers who have placed their first order to gather information from them.
2. Inform them if there are any queries.
3. If they face any issues while placing their first order, solve them so that there are no further problems.
4. Update server information correctly.

Requirements: Type of Job: Full-time (Contractual) Workplace: Motijheel, Dhaka (Office-based work) Office Hours: Morning 10:00 AM - Evening 7:00 PM Salary: ৳10,000 - ৳11,000 (Negotiable based on discussion) Required Qualifications: Minimum educational qualification: HSC At least 6 months of experience in call center will be preferred. Must have Bangla typing speed (minimum 20 words per minute) Proficiency in computer usage

দায়িত্ব সমুহঃ ১। ১ম বার অর্ডার করা কাস্টমারদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করে তাদের কাছ থেকে তথ্য নেয়া। ২। তাদের যদি কোন কোয়েরী থাকে তা জানানো। ৩। প্রথম বার অর্ডার করার সময় তারা যদি কোন সমস্যার সম্মুখীন হন তাহলে তার সমাধান করা যাতে পরবর্তীতে আর সমস্যা না হয়। ৪। সার্ভের তথ্য সঠিক ভাবে আপডেট করা।
